forecast-period.text: Sunny. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:30am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula in the late afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending westerly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning easterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Sunny. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sunny. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Sunny. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending easterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sunny. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h turning north to northeasterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sunny. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Keith, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending west to southwesterly in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Sunny. The chance of morning frost near the eastern border. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Sunny. The chance of morning frost. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Sunny. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:30am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Sunny. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning westerly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the west in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Sunny. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sunny. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h shifting west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Sunny. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sunny. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Sunny. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending west to southwesterly in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending east to southeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Sunny. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 27.
Sunny. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to high 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:40am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Sunny. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly during the day then tending east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 29.

Sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the day then becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 28.
Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 3:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Sunny. The chance of fog south of Streaky Bay in the early morning. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting south to southeasterly in the late morning and afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching 28 to 33.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Nullarbor in the afternoon and evening. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Nullarbor in the afternoon. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 30 to 35.
Sunny. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Sunny. The chance of fog in the south in the early morning. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h shifting south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Sunny. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly in the early afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:50am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

The chance of fog in the early morning. Sunny day. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting south to southeasterly in the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the east coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning easterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h turning north to northeasterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the middle of the day. Daytime maximum temperatures around 30.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:30am to 3:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Sunny. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

The chance of a thunderstorm in the far west in the morning. Sunny day. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly during the morning then tending northeast to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Sunny morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the far west in the afternoon and evening. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching 30 to 35.
Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures 25 to 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:20am to 3:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Sunny. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 32.
Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 32.
